_meta.description: Equipment cost correlations used for sizing-dependent pricing

tank_cost.description: Cone roof tank cost as a function of capacity
tank_cost.notes: Likely from Perry's Chemical Engineers' Handbook or similar. No documentation in original model.

pond_cost.description: Open raceway pond fully installed cost as a function of size
pond_cost.escalation_to_2022: baked into coefficients (fitted to already-escalated data)
pond_cost.source_citation: NREL 2011 Algae Farm Model_Open Ponds_TEA Tool_v1
pond_cost.notes: Linear fit to NREL 'Full' liner option data, escalated to 2022. Fully installed — no additional installation factors.

paddlewheel_energy.description: Paddlewheel energy consumption as a power-law function of pond size
paddlewheel_energy.source_citation: NREL 2011 Algae Farm Model_Open Ponds_TEA Tool_v1
paddlewheel_energy.notes: Power-law fit to NREL data at 2, 10, 50 acre points. To get total: result × pond_acres × active_days × n_ponds

spray_dryer_cost.description: Spray dryer cost as a function of evaporation rate
spray_dryer_cost.notes: Source not documented in original model.

escalation_factors.description: Cost year escalation factors used throughout the model

factors.notes: Should be replaced with actual CEPCI indices for configurability

currency_conversions.notes: Static rate used for Australian pump pricing
